programme.title: Aarakshan
programme.desc: The controversial policy of caste-based reservations in government jobs and educational institutions in India leads to a conflict between a teacher hailing from a lower class, his good friend belonging to the upper caste, and his mentor.

programme.title: Kandahar
programme.desc: Suryanath, an unemployed pilot, gets inspired by Major Mahadevan to join the Indian Army. Soon, while travelling to Kandahar with his team, their flight gets hijacked. Now Suryanath must rise to the occasion to save the hostages along with his team.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: The Final Countdown
programme.desc: A modern aircraft carrier is thrown back in time to 1941 near Hawaii, just hours before the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: OK! MADAM
programme.desc: Mi-Young runs a shop at a traditional market, where she makes and sells twisted bread sticks. Her husband Seok-Hwan works as a computer repairman. One day, Seok-Hwan wins a free trip to Hawaii. Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan will go on their first international trip together. When Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan get on the airplane to Hawaii, things don't go as expected. Terrorists, including Cheol-Seung, who chase after a secret agent, get on the same airplane. The passengers soon become hostages. Suddenly, Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan begin to rescue the passengers.

programme.title: Rail Kings
programme.desc: Riding speeding boxcars, Preston encounters hostile train yards, vicious railroad cops, hidden hobo jungles, mysterious Lacy, the notorious Baron and his colorful Hobo Gang. In a surprise ending, Preston finally confronts Phantom 13. Based on the controversial Hobo Times books.An irresponsible preppie, Preston West, is presumed to have murdered his parents for a sizeable inheritance, so he flees to find the real killer, Phantom 13, a crazed freight train hobo!

programme.title: The Earthshot Prize Innovation Summit 2024
programme.desc: Founded by His Royal Highness, Prince William, The Earthshot Prize is a global competition designed to incentivize change and help to repair our planet by awarding five winners each year for their contributions to environmentalism. This year's Innovation Summit featured finalists selected by the Earthshot council in addition to panelists ranging from heads of state, grassroots organizations and tech leaders. This special Bloomberg program highlights the event's biggest interviews and news makers. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Momentum
programme.desc: Haslina Amin reveals how Korean Pop culture is reshaping Seoul, blending tradition with innovation while providing the world a new wave to follow.

programme.title: Momentum
programme.desc: Joining Haslinda Amin as she explores the way robots and AI are integrated into Japanese life from drones managing crops to unmanned harvesters, how AI is paving the way to a more efficient future.

programme.title: Momentum
programme.desc: South Korea is emerging as a pivotal force in reshaping maritime transportation, leading the way to a future with autonomous ships and more eco-friendly propulsion systems.

programme.title: Hello World
programme.desc: Switzerland is full of advanced tech startups, thanks to business-friendly laws and an appetite for new ideas visiting an inventor who makes drones do miraculous things and a company that's growing human skin in a lab.

programme.title: Hello World
programme.desc: Switzerland is home to some of the world's most advanced research on the brain and its connection to the body, from a company that helps restore movement in the paralyzed to brain-research labs combining neuroscience, computers and AI.

programme.title: Hello World
programme.desc: Burning Man meets Mad Max at King of the Hammers, a 212-mile-long offroad race in the California desert that only the hardiest racers with the most kitted-out vehicles will even finish.

programme.title: Hello World
programme.desc: As the country looks to leapfrog ahead, it's turning to an ambitious young workforce meeting the "Zuckerberg of Nigeria" along with other top founders, all of whom see the nation's infrastructure problems as opportunities for innovation.

programme.title: Hello World
programme.desc: Traveling from California to Ohio and to the Hindenburg's birthplace in Germany to see if zeppelins, the majestic airships whose golden age passed a century ago with the Hindenburg disaster, can really make a comeback.

programme.title: Hello World
programme.desc: The tiny, landlocked former Soviet nation of Kyrgyzstan is hoping to join the global tech economy by empowering its engineers and content creators. We hang out with the blockbuster YouTube success D-Billions, and learn about a darker side of Kyrgyz society from feminist singer-songwriter Zere.

programme.title: Dhartiputra Nandini
programme.desc: Dhartiputra Nandini Tells The Story Of A Farmer Girl Who Wants To Stay Connected To Her Land. At The Same Time, Akash Returns From America. Sumitra Devi Wishes That His Grandson Akash Should Take Over The Entire Business By Becoming “Ceo.” At The Same Time, Her Family Is Falling Apart, And She Needs An Ideal Daughter-In-Law Who Understands The Responsibility Of Being Her Daughter-In-Law. She Sees Nandini As That, But Akash Refuses To Accept Her Since She Is Not Educated. Nandini Proves That She Is The Best, Both As A Supporter And A Life Partner. She Is There For Akash'S Family In Every Circumstance. This Is The Journey Of “Dhartiputra Nandini” From “Life Partner For Life” To “Charioteer.” In Addition, She Manages His Business. Nandini Also Fulfills Akash'S Dreams And Makes The Name Of The Country Known To The Entire World

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

Laughter and tears ensue as they _hinage in silly games, wrestle with chocolate, and explore the limits of their mischievous imaginations. Through their ups and downs, they find joy and connection, ultimately forming a bond filled with laughter, forgiveness, and unexpected surprises

programme.title: The Seagull Invasion
programme.desc: Jane and Jerry try to shoo the seagull out of the house, but it continues to flyaround, causing more chaos. The seagull starts to take over the house, making itselfat home and pus_hing Jane and Jerry out.The two siblings come up with a plan totake back their home

programme.title: The I Wish I could see the Jester
programme.desc: A lover of art and history, Robert wants to see a missing painting

programme.title: Flash Flood/Steer Me in the Right Direction
programme.desc: The Rangers have to reunite a gorilla family separated by a flash flood./The Rangers have to save cows from a wildfire.

programme.title: The Adventures of Peter and Wolf
programme.desc: A sitcom about the adventures of ordinary schoolboy Peter and talking Wolf connecting the world of people to parallel universes, where there live robots and vampires, werewolves and zombies, giants and aliens, fairies and centaurs, clones and invisible men! The characters will have to solve locals' problems and regularly save the world.

programme.title: Magic Lantern
programme.desc: Animation series “Magic Lantern” tells little viewers wonderful adventure stories, based on classic literature plots. Little video games fan Mike and his smart sister Kate watch and discuss each story presented as a strip film. Funny stories will help seeing classic stories from the new side and prove that world classic literature is exciting and interesting.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: I' ll Get You! Holiday
programme.desc: The action takes place in all year round resort, where Wolf doesn' t chase Hare to eat him anymore: now it' s all about sports and competition. However, in his crazy chase after recognition and victories the grey hooligan often uses methods that aren' t really fair, which provokes awkward and funny situations.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Fishtronaut
programme.desc: The series tells the story of Fishtronaut, a fish in a spacesuit, similar to reverse scuba gear, which allows him to fly and breathe out of water.

programme.title: Pincode
programme.desc: Grown up Kikoriki characters rock the world with their scientific superpowers and tell the kids scientific facts in a most entertaining way. The crew follows Captain Pin as they learn about the world we live in and share this knowledge with us.

programme.title: Robocar POLI
programme.desc: The courageous and swift police car POLI, the powerful fire engine ROY, the intelligent AMBER, and the flying HELLY are all here to save the day!

programme.title: Tommy the Little Dragon
programme.desc: Tommy is a soft toy who lives with an ordinary panda family. Panda parents have no idea about him, while their cubs cannot live a day without Tommy! With the help of his magic soap bubbles, Tommy teleports kids to wonderful universes full of adventures, to help them discover a vast and captivating world, fight their fears and inhibitions, and learn important family values.

programme.title: Bat Pat
programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: Zac is a Genius Solve This
programme.desc: Check out my amazing collection of cubes! I didn't even know they made such crazy and weird cubes. I can't believe that people can actually solve some of these. Which one would you want?

programme.title: Live Shows with Savannah
programme.desc: Savannah Zwi is a musician, actress, and artist.Beautifully crafted sceneries transport the audience to magical realities and create fantastical memories! Stories are acted out in exquisite costumes with puppets and props which come to life before your eyes and encourage the viewer to use their imagination!The productions feature original handmade sets, captivating vocal performances of original music as well as loved Disney and musical theatre classics, cheeky puppet shows, and inventive storytelling. Through an innovative, educational experience, the productions expose children to the English language in an enchanting and inventive way. They encourage good moral values, creativity and using your imagination!The Savannah Kids experience enlightens both the spirit and the soul, aiming to bond and delight families entrancing and entertaining, inspiring young minds.

programme.title: Official Adoption and Name Reveal For Our New Puppy

programme.title: The Electric Odyssey
programme.desc: In this special episode of Electric Odyssey we go behind the scenes and look at all thing technical in the Extreme E paddock.

programme.title: The Electric Odyssey
programme.desc: In the last episode of the season, we go behind the cameras to catch the drama of the final showdown weekend of the championship and look back at the favourite moments of the drivers this year.

programme.title: The Electric Odyssey
programme.desc: All the action from Round 1, including a spectacular showdown from two heavyweight teams. Extreme E's first female Saudi driver, Dania Akeel and new team, Sun Minimeal tell us what they'll bring to the paddock this season.

programme.title: The Electric Odyssey
programme.desc: The first double header of the season comes to an end in Saudi Arabia, with a lot of battles on course. We meet action sports legend Travis Pastrana. And we learn about the loss of coral reefs in the Red Sea and how to preserve them.

programme.title: The Electric Odyssey
programme.desc: In this episode, we take you behind the scenes with unfiltered content from the opening rounds in Jeddah. We dive into some of the problems faced by the Red Sea's coral reef. And unpack how this nomadic championship packs down after an event.

programme.title: The Electric Odyssey

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, we'll dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: The Way Back Home
programme.desc: Rohan Thakur finds his true calling as he begins a journey to revisit his roots in Himachal Pradesh. Way Back Home is as much a travelogue of childhood, as of growing up. Get ready for a journey of a lifetime

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: We break the bounds of earth, and look at the environment of space. We examine the difficulties and challenges of exploring this most challenging environment. George experiences some of the extreme training needed for space travel aboard a Czech-built Albatross fighter jet, the Zero-G plane, and a centrifuge producing 6 Gs of force, and witnesses the launch of a flight to the International Space Station.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Its dark, its cold, there is no air to breath and everything is under extreme pressure. George begins his exploration of the deep with a well-preserved shipwreck in the st.lawrence River, then heads west to dive with undersea explorers Chris Harvey-Clark and Phil Nuyyton, and investigate the newly discovered Black Smoker deepsea vents. The show climaxes in Curacao, where we dive to 1000 feet aboard Nuyytons newest submersible.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: In 2000, a remarkable find was made in Chihuahua, Mexico, of a spectacular cave filled with giant crystals, some over 20 meters long. But it is a intensely difficult spot to explore with temperatures over 50 degrees C and humidity well over 100%. George leads an Explorers Club Flag Expedition into the cave, wearing special refrigerated suits and respirators to battle the extreme environment.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: The Angry Planet team will be tracking storms through the 2009 Hurricane season, and plan to film george as he heads into a big one.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: The Angry Planet team hopes to film the natural wonders and extreme phenomena of this fascinating Central Asian country, including a spectacularly burning crater of natural gas, underground lakes, sandstorms and remnants of the dinosaurs.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Ground Zero for host/adventurer George Kourounis stormchasing is Oklahoma City, capital of North Americas Tornado Alley. George tracks a building storm that threatens that tough mid-western city, chases a hail storm, fights to get in the middle of a vicious dust-devil and the funky roadside Americana of the American Midwest.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Host/adventurer George Kourounis explores the American Southwest during the Desert Monsoon. He ups the danger factor by traveling with wild atheist shock-jock R.J. Evans to track massive lightning storms which can produce bolts of up to one hundred million volts. The pair come close - too close - to dangerous electrical clouds swirling over Tucson, Sedona and Monument Valley.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: The Angry Planet team heads to Africa to climb the steep and very active Nyiragongo Volcano in the Congo that erupted in 2002, sending 125,000 people fleeing for their lives. Host/adventurer George Kourounis explores the bubbling lake of molten lava and investigates the risk the dangerous volcano poses to both the people of city of Goma and the Mountain Gorillas who live on the nearby jungle slopes.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: The countdown has begun as we prepare for some of the most extreme weather caught on camera! Everything from supercell thunderstorms, to mile-high tornados! We got you covered while you stay covered. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Mother Nature is back and ready to blow you away, with some of the fiercest, most electrifying, and most extreme weather we have ever seen! So buckle in and let's get ready to ride! (S1 E02)

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Mother Nature isn't messing around and she's back with even more of the craziest weather clips assembled. From the shores of Florida, to the outback of Australia, we've traveled the world to collect these videos, and each one is designed to blow you away. (S1 E03)

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: It doesn't matter that there are over a 1000 tornados or millions of thunderstorms take place all over the world every year someone is always going to be there to capture it and when they do, you know that we are going to show it to you! (S1 E04)

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Are you ready for some electricyfing weather videos? Because we've got it all...wind storms, flashfloods, and even hurricanes! We've pulled together some of the craziest weather you've ever seen! (S1 E05)

programme.title: Wrecking Plan
programme.desc: An Airbus A320 is brought onto the Pad and the Cut Up Crew searches for piñatas. Another load of aluminum is hauled away before the DC-10 tail is cut off and dropped to the ground in dramatic fashion.

programme.title: Wrecking Plan

programme.desc: Avalanche danger is very high in the Rogers Pass area of the Trans Canada Highway in British Columbia. Host of Angry Planet George Kourounis travels with a variety of experts to bring down huge avalanches in the Rocky Mountains.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Our host George becomes a “human popsicle”, encased in ice in at the National Resarch Council's high speed wind tunnel. Then he and his sidekick Mark Robinson climb to the top of the mountain in mid-January and brave their way into a summit blizzard.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Some of the fiercest weather on the planet can be experienced at the southern tip of Argentina and Chile– the area the South Americans call the “Fin del Mundo” – the end of the world.

programme.title: Angry Planet

programme.title: The Wizard of Whatever: Holiday Edition
programme.desc: Gusto TV's Wizard of Whatever, Chef Kyle Crawford, is dishing up a holiday feast! There'll be food, fun, elves… and even jolly old St. Nick himself may make an appearance! Join in as Kyle cooks up a Christmas goose complete with stuffing and gravy, plus all the sides and salads, and even a flashy flambé dessert! Merry whatever! (S1 E01)

programme.title: Michael Bonacini's Christmas at the Farm
programme.desc: In this heartwarming holiday special, Chef Michael Bonacini invites us to his cozy farmhouse in Ontario for a charming Christmas feast. In this scenic winter retreat, Bonacini interprets classic Welsh and Italian Christmas dishes from his childhood. Michael cooks up comforting dishes from hearty potato leek soup, to succulent roast lamb, to classic molten chocolate lava cake. As he explores homey Christmas flavours, Michael shares his traditions and gives tips for perfecting the holiday meal. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Watts Up for the Holidays
programme.desc: Spencer Watts serves up his take on traditional holiday fare, showing us that you can make an impressive dinner without the stress. In this cheerful one-hour special, charming bachelor Spencer takes you through all the planning tips and lets you in on his secrets to create the ultimate holiday meal. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Flour Power Holiday Specials
programme.desc: The holidays are here! And the holidays come with a lineup of treats you won't be able to resist! From sweet and salty to traditional and unconventional, FLOUR POWER CHRISTMAS: BIG WOW DESSERTS covers it all. To get in the holiday spirit, enchanting host Jessica McGovern introduces two desserts that could impress any Scrooge. First, Jessica bakes a decadent Chocolate Yule Log stuffed with a creamy Salted Caramel Frosting and finishes with a holiday-inspired cake decorated with homemade peppermint candy canes! Interwoven with tricks of the trade, Jessica guides us through her simple yet inspiring treats that are perfect for a big Christmas celebration. (S1 E1004)

programme.title: One World Kitchen: Our Favourite Holiday Recipes
programme.desc: In this special holiday episode of One World Kitchen, Hana (Japan), Vanessa (Italy), Natalia (Argentina), and Pailin (Thailand) get together to cook their favorite traditional holiday dishes influenced by their respective cultures. Christmas Sushi Rolls, Veal in a Creamy Tuna Sauce with Capers, Striped Bass in Garlic and Lime Marinade, and an epic Timballo. For the final recipe, our hosts combine all the flavors of One World Kitchen into a truly internationally-inspired turkey dish. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Bonacini's Italian Christmas
programme.desc: BONACINI'S ITALIAN CHRISTMAS is a heartwarming one-hour holiday special featuring celebrity Chef Michael Bonacini as he shares some of his favourite Italian Christmas Eve dishes. Michael invites us to the set of his series "Bonacini's Italy" to cook up traditional Italian fare like Salt Cod Mousse on Polenta Crostini and Pork Braised in Milk. Michael takes us on a holiday culinary journey as he explores homey Christmas flavours and traditions, offering tips for perfecting dishes from the regions of Veneto, Sardinia, Calabria, Sicily, and Emilia Romagna. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Holiday Eatz
programme.desc: Chef Kimberly Lallouz is celebrating Winter Solstice with a Holiday Eatz menu of quick recipes guaranteed to get you out of the kitchen before the year's earliest sunset. First, she makes a Warm Green Bean Salad with crispy pancetta. Next, it's White Chili made with turkey, cannellini beans, and Poblano peppers. Stick around for her Double thick pork chop with Wild Mushrooms, Chestnuts, and Sage. For dessert? A pear flambe with sweet port, spices, and easy walnut streusel.

programme.title: Spencer's Big Holiday
programme.desc: No matter how you celebrate the holidays, let Spencer Watts help you plan the menu, in SPENCER'S BIG HOLIDAY! In this festive one-hour holiday special, Spencer Watts is serving up some of his favourite holiday meals, treats, and drinks. Follow Spencer as he shows us how to sail through the hectic holiday season with style, from brunch to the moment the clock strikes midnight. (S1 E01)

Dubai Historic District, United Arab Emirates
programme.desc: Discover the city of the world's tallest skyscraper differently. We invite you to a historical tour of Dubai. See Dubai from where all started through the Middle Eastern markets, traditional houses, and historic streets of the old city.

programme.title: Ein Kerem Israel Part1
programme.desc: Ein Kerem, the place of the birth of Saint John the Baptist, as well as the visitation of Mary, but also a chic and pastoral touristic place…

programme.title: Ein Kerem, Israel Part 2
programme.desc: Ein Kerem, the place of the birth of Saint John the Baptist, as well as the visitation of Mary, but also a chic and pastoral touristic place…

programme.title: Sea of Galilee, Israel Part 2
programme.desc: On the shores of the Sea of Galilee, also called the Lake of Tiberias, discover a freshwater lake with an area of 166 m2 located in the North-East of Israel. Of course this lake is of great importance to Christians : at this particular place, several episodes of Jesus' life took place.

programme.title: Jakarta Old Town, Indonesia Part 1
programme.desc: We are in Jakarta,Indonesia one of the Old Town of the world heritage. And today shall take you around Jakarta Old Town, also known as Kota Tua. The old town of Jakarta is the cradle of Jakarta history.

programme.title: Jakarta Old Town, Indonesia Part 2
programme.desc: The second episode of this documentary series about the old town of Jakarta. Often referred to as Kota Tua Jakarta or Old Batavia, the old center is a neighborhood in the central city of Jakarta. Old Town District covers an area of ​​1.3 square kilometers within North Jakarta and West Jakarta and also includes China Town called Glodok.

programme.title: Sveti Juraj, Montenegro
programme.desc: Sveti Đorđe Island is one of the two islets off the coast of Perast in the Bay of Kotor, Montenegro. Unlike Gospa od Škrpjela, it is a natural island.

programme.title: Tauric Chersonesos, Crimea
programme.desc: 528 BC. in the west of the Heracles Peninsula, the Dorian Greeks founded the city of Chersonesus in Crimea, which means "peninsula". Founded as a colony of the wealthy Greek city of Heraclea of Pontus, its history is part of the Ancient Greece, Ancient Rome and Byzantium. In the Middle Ages, Chersonesus was called Kherson.

programme.title: Palazzo Ducale di Urbino, Italy
programme.desc: Hidden in the hills of Italy lies Palazzo Ducale di Urbino, the Ducal Palace of Urbino. It may seem strange to find such grand Renaissance architecture outside of the great cities. We all know about Rome, Venice, Florence and their great works. But the Ducal Palace of Urbino is often forgotten, despite rivaling all of them with its splendor and great history.

programme.title: Kursi, National Park, Israel
programme.desc: We are 30km west of Jerusalem, on the border between the Judean Mountains and the Ayalon Valley, in the village of Nicopolis. You may know it better as Emmaus. Here, thanks to its strategic position, Emmaus has played an important role in the country's administrative, military and economic life many times in its history.

programme.title: Marmashen Monastery, Armenia
programme.desc: Here we are: in a beautiful valley on the left bank of Akhurian River, 10 km northwest of the city of Gyumri, 2 km southwest of the village of Vahramaberd in the Shirak region in Armenia. We are at Marmashen Monastery. Surrounded by fruit orchards this magnificent monument once was a prominent cultural and religious center and is considered as the finest example of the medieval architecture of Armenia…

programme.title: HOTELS in Rio de Janeiro
programme.desc: Would you prefer a prestigious palace, an eco-lodge in the middle of the jungle, a charming villa or a design temple in an urban setting? LUXURY DREAMS takes you on a voyage of discovery of rare addresses, always top luxury, often quite unusual. Today direction Paris in France (Part 3)

programme.title: Lisbon Historic Center, Portugal, Part 2
programme.desc: One of the most charismatic, vibrant, and picturesque cities in Europe: Lisbon, Portugal's capital. It is a city where a rich historical past, striking modernism, and progressive thinking are closely and organically combined.

programme.title: Penang area, Malaysia
programme.desc: Penang's Malaysian state's main constituent island is a region with a unique blend of Malay, Chinese, Indian and British cultures and traditions, with a vibrant history. Overflowing with charming historic buildings and ornate religious sites, the island r"&"esembles a magnificent city from the past entirely. Located at the Ayer Itam suburbs foot in George Town, also called Penang, and the leading port of Malaysia, Kek Lok Si temple is known as the jewel in Malaysia's crown of heritage temples. The temple com"&"plex expands from the very temple, which is considered one of the largest and finest temple complexes in Southeast Asia. The complex grows over approximately 30 acres donated by Yeoh Siew Beow, who became the temple's first abbot.
